audit_items.proof_trace: At the time `_onAuctionStart` is called, line 92 executes `forceApprove(relayer, balanceOf(address(this)))` — both the balance read and the approval write occur within the same atomic transaction with no yield point between them, so approval == balance holds by construction. Post-bid stale approval (approval > balance) is architecturally benign: ERC20 prevents `transferFrom` beyond balance, `isValidSignature` performs a live `balanceOf` guard at lines 144-146 before any CoW settlement, and the `s_entered` reentrancy lock (lines 415-418 in `bid`, lines 125-126 in `isValidSignature`) prevents the vault relayer from executing a settlement concurrently with a bid.
